description: Bartosz discusses the programming model on Solana, explaining how accounts, programs, and transactions are interconnected. He highlights the importance of the Explorer for viewing accounts and transactions, and details the token program's functionality, including its similarities to ERC20 standards. The session covers deploying smart contracts, transaction fees, and the use of predefined programs for minting tokens.
topic_summary: Overview of Solana's programming model, smart contract deployment, and token interactions, including the use of the Explorer for tracking transactions and accounts [t=01:52 - t=15:30].
